title: Kaohsiung、Kaohsiung — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Kaohsiung、Kaohsiung的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Kaohsiung是Kaohsiung的一個城市，人口約2,734,000。Taiwan’s second-largest city and major port, known for its harbor, night markets, and cultural attractions.
